query: SELECT p.fullName, COUNT(s.id) as cnt FROM blastPlayers p LEFT JOIN blastSessions s ON s.playerId = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.fullName;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3knp7kHgPS8ePkR.root --database 4gdCHRuKFjrDK3bmH43Eh2 --execute SELECT p.fullName, COUNT(s.id) as cnt FROM blastPlayers p LEFT JOIN blastSessions s ON s.playerId = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.fullName;
